name: Garlicky Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of salted water to boil on high heat. Add green beans and boil until crisp-tender, about 2 to 4 minutes. Alternatively, steam the beans for about 5 minutes until they are crisp-tender.
2. Drain the beans and refresh under cold running water.
3. Heat butter and garlic together in a skillet over medium heat. Toss in the beans and sauté until hot and coated with the mixture. Season with salt and pepper.
This version follows all the specified rules, ensuring clarity and consistency while maintaining the original recipe's integrity.
